title.en: The mountain peaks shattered, and the Xuangang ...

content.en:
Ji Heng.

This is a boundary-breaking genius of the White Shadow Elephant Clan, a creature of the Blood Transformation Realm four times.

The strength of the four Blood Transformation Realm creatures of the Boundary Breaking level is not as good as the six Blood Transformation Realm creatures, but it can be called invincible among the five Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Therefore, after Ji Heng appeared, these five Blood Transformation Realm creatures immediately retreated.

"Xuangang Crystal Essence, I want it!"

Ji Heng said.

The Blood Transformation Realm creatures present didn't dare to say anything, and retreated one by one.

Rumble!!!!

The mountain peaks shattered, and the Xuangang crystal essence was revealed.

"Sanfang, it's okay!"

Ji Heng slowly took out the Xuangang crystal essence, separated from this piece of heaven and earth, and put it away.

And those creatures of the Five Blood Transformation Realm showed remorseful expressions one after another, they already knew that they would not fight, and how good it would be to divide them directly.

The three-party Xuangang crystal essence is worth 1.8 million white elephant gold, and every time you have five blood transformation realms, you can share hundreds of thousands of white elephant gold!

Today, they get nothing.

Wow!

Ji Heng left directly.

"Envy!"

A group of Blood Transformation Realm creatures sighed.

They also fantasized about getting so much Xuangang Crystal Essence, but unfortunately their strength was not good.

......

Whew!!!

One by one, the Blood Transformation creatures left, and they continued to search for resource treasures.

Ye Tian also left and continued to look for resources.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian gradually found several resources, but they were not so precious, not as precious as the primeval golden fruit he discovered last time.

"There's another piece of debris here!"

The fragment was very broken, and it was also very small, very inconspicuous.

But Ye Tian entered this fragmented space in line with the principle of not letting go of passing by.

"Hey, what's that?" he sensed a different fluctuation, and if he hadn't probed carefully, he really hadn't noticed it.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian tore apart the fragments of the earth, and finally saw a fragment of a turtle shell deep underground.

This fragment of the turtle shell exuded terrifying fluctuations, and it was not the fragment of an ordinary Blood Transformation Realm creature.

"This breath ......"

Ye Tian deduced for a moment, and immediately understood what level of the Ancient Golden Turtle's turtle shell fragment was.

Seven Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Golden Turtle Shell Fragments!

Ye Tian had heard that the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan had fallen to a Seven-Time Blood Transformation Realm, and it was here that a great battle broke out, and the Ancient Golden Turtle of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm was killed, and the turtle shell must have been shattered.

Although the Ancient Demon Ape Clan had taken away the corpses of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Golden Turtles, they should have missed one or two fragments, and this was one of the fragments.

"The turtle shell of the primeval golden turtle clan is very hard, and it is a good material for refining. If it was before, it would be very dangerous for the White Elephant City to trade the turtle shell of the primeval golden turtle, but now even if it is an open and honest transaction, the primeval golden turtle clan will not dare to come out. Such a piece of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Golden Turtle Shell should be able to sell a lot of white elephant gold. "

Ye Tian put away this primeval golden turtle shell, and his mood was suddenly extremely comfortable.

"There is also the Seven Blood Transformation Realm arm of the Hidden River Fragment, my current strength should be able to take it away and sell it when the time comes. "

Ye Tian decided.

......

Somewhere in the area of the Primeval Turtle Sea fragments.

Ji Heng of the White Shadow Elephant Clan and several other White Shadow Elephants of the Five Blood Transformation Realms gathered here.

"Ji Heng, have you found the Ancient Gold Leaf?"

One of the five-time Blood Transformation Realm White Shadow Elephants asked.

"No!" Ji Heng shook his head, "I've looked for many places, but I didn't perceive the primeval gold leaf. "

Another White Shadow of the Five-Time Blood Transformation Realm said, "Could it be snatched away by the Ancient Demon Ape Clan?"

"No!" Ji Heng shook his head, "That Ancient Golden Leaf was bred here endless years ago, and the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan didn't even dare to move its location, once it moved, the aura of the Ancient Golden Leaf was exposed, enough to cover the vast area." At that time, the primeval golden turtle clan will not be able to keep the primeval gold leaf. Therefore, they didn't dare to move the primeval golden leaf, so they could only silently comprehend the primeval technique recorded on the primeval gold leaf, but unfortunately, they didn't practice that primeval technique, otherwise the primeval golden turtle's seven-time blood transformation realm would not fall. "

"Yes, the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan thought that the Ancient Golden Leaf was not exposed, but unfortunately they didn't know that the Demon Snake Clan stationed here had already discovered the Ancient Golden Leaf, and the Demon Snake Clan was not killed by the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan, and a Demon Snake Clan recently took refuge in us and provided us with the news. "

"The Ancient Golden Turtle Clan probably thought that no other Blood Transformation Realm race knew about it, so they could always hide the Ancient Golden Leaf, but we knew about it, and we must find it out. "

"Let's look carefully, the primeval golden leaf must have been hidden by the primeval golden beetle clan in a special way, and it is not easy to find, otherwise the primeval demon ape clan would have known about it a long time ago. "

They discussed for a while, then continued to look for the primeval gold leaf.

......

A mysterious place.

The primeval beetles are hidden here.

At this time, the powerhouse of the primeval golden turtle clan was here chatting about the primeval turtle sea.

"Many races have gathered in the Ancient Turtle Sea in search of resources. "

"Although we have left some things behind, they are not too valuable, and we can't attract too powerful Blood Transformation Realm. "

"No, we still have the Ancient Gold Leaf left!"

"Don't worry, the Ancient Golden Leaf is very deeply hidden, even if the Seven Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses have been looking for it there for a long time, they can't find it!"

"Yes, only our primeval golden turtle clan can find primeval gold leaves, and other races can't find them. "

"We must practice that primeval technique, so that we can return to the primeval turtle sea, otherwise if we come out now, after the primeval demon ape clan knows about it, they will definitely send a strong man to deal with us again. "

"Or, if we give birth to an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm powerhouse, we can also be not afraid of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan. "

"The White Shadow Elephants are unwilling to help us, otherwise we wouldn't be in such a situation. "

"The White Shadow Elephant Clan, hehe, they are willing to weaken our strength so that it will not threaten its position!"

"So, we still have to rely on ourselves! In the future, we must destroy the Ancient Demon Ape Clan!"

......

The years passed.

As the resources of the primeval turtle sea were gradually excavated, many Blood Transformation Realm creatures left here.

"There are no resources here, so let's go to White Elephant City and trade the resources first. "

Ye Tian went directly to the White Elephant City, and although he encountered a little trouble during the period, he still arrived at the White Elephant City safely with his own strength.
